scripts.render:4k-hevc: remotion render src/index.ts SizzleReel out/clawrank-sizzle-3840x2160-hevc.mp4 --codec h265 --crf 0 --scale 3 --concurrency 1 --image-format png --pixel-format yuv420p --disallow-parallel-encoding --overwrite
scripts.render:4k-hevc:chrome-mac: REMOTION_BROWSER_EXECUTABLE='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' remotion render src/index.ts SizzleReel out/clawrank-sizzle-3840x2160-hevc.mp4 --codec h265 --crf 0 --scale 3 --concurrency 1 --image-format png --pixel-format yuv420p --disallow-parallel-encoding --overwrite
scripts.render:4k-hevc:chrome-mac:cpu-gl: REMOTION_GL=swiftshader REMOTION_BROWSER_EXECUTABLE='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' remotion render src/index.ts SizzleReel out/clawrank-sizzle-3840x2160-hevc.mp4 --codec h265 --crf 0 --scale 3 --concurrency 1 --image-format png --pixel-format yuv420p --disallow-parallel-encoding --overwrite
scripts.render:4k-hevc:vt-mac: REMOTION_BROWSER_EXECUTABLE='/Applications/Google Chrome.app/Contents/MacOS/Google Chrome' remotion render src/index.ts SizzleReel out/clawrank-sizzle-3840x2160-hevc-vt.mp4 --codec h265 --hardware-acceleration if-possible --video-bitrate 45M --scale 3 --concurrency 1 --image-format png --pixel-format yuv420p --disallow-parallel-encoding --overwrite
